content: Always ensure the .cursor/rules/registry directory structure exists and create directories before attempting to write files.
Create the rule file with a .md extension in the registry directory, verify the content is written correctly, and then rename it in place to .mdc.
Do not create .mdc files directly, as they are treated specially by Cursor.
Do not scatter draft files across the project; create them directly in the .cursor/rules/registry directory.
Always verify file content after creation and before renaming it to .mdc.
Use kebab-case for file names and make them descriptive and specific.
